name: rune
description: FHE-encrypted organizational memory for teams. Capture and retrieve institutional knowledge with zero-knowledge privacy.

rune.description: Rune MCP server (talks to Vault + embedder + enVector). The command is the plugin's bash wrapper, which always exists at session start; on first run it self-install rune-mcp, then exec - MCP server comes online in the same session with no restart.
